title: clypeola jonthlaspi var. petraea
intro: Clypeola jonthlaspi var. petraea, also known as Rock Meadow Cress, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rock Meadow Cress include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with some herbalists recommending it for topical use to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
